title: How to self-host a reranker — sentence-transformers, GPU, serving | reranker.uk
description: Practical guide to self-hosting cross-encoder rerankers: model choice (bge, mxbai, Jina), sentence-transformers quick start, FastAPI serving, and production ops.
og_description: Zero per-call cost reranking on your own infra — from CrossEncoder to a production microservice.
